subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up after the conference. I'd be glad to schedule a formal meeting to discuss how we might work together.

I'm available for a call at any of the following times next week:
• Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which option suits you best.

Regarding your request for contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to provide internal contact information directly. I'm happy to coordinate any senior-level discussions through this channel as our conversation progresses.

Best regards
